title: VonHaus Oil Filled Radiator 11 Fin – Oil Heater Portable Electric Free Standing 2500W for Home, Office, Any Room – 24 hour Timer, Adjustable Thermostat, 3 Heat Settings, 4x Wheels, 1.5m Power Cable
features: UPGRADED 11 FIN DESIGN: Create optimal warmth with the VonHaus black oil filled radiator, powered by ThermoDynamic engineering. The enhanced fins boast an increased surface area and five oil channels for higher heat dissipation.
ENERGY EFFICIENT: The electric radiator is fitted with 1000W/1500W/2500W outputs and a 24-hour timer for customisable comfort. Schedule the timer to tailor your heating and keep warm for less.
ADVANCED SAFETY FEATURES: Designed with safety at its core, our oil heater provides peace of mind. The automatic overheat shut-off and 45° tip-over protection ensure secure comfort.
USER FOCUSED: Invest in a plug in radiator that's built for your lifestyle. The 360° wheels and carry handle allow manoeuvrability between rooms, whilst the cable tidy keeps the 1.5m cable contained.
OUR BRAND PROMISE: Established in 2009, VonHaus is the helping hand you need to stay comfortable all year round. Designed using innovative technology, keep warm this winter with our oil radiator.
description: Product Description Your home, heated your way. VonHaus 11 Fin Oil Filled Radiator | Oil Heaters for Home Keep warm this winter with the new and improved VonHaus 11 fin oil filled radiator. Powered by ThermoDynamic engineering, the precision fins feature five oil channels and an enhanced surface area for unrivalled heating efficiency. More than just a heater, invest in your comfort and well-being today. Your home, heated your way. 2500W Black Oil Filled Heater with Thermostat Dial & Timer | Portable Radiator Transform your space into a haven of warmth with minimum energy wastage. Equipped with an adjustable thermostat and power settings of 1000W, 1500W, and 2500W, you can provide the optimum heating needed to warm any room up to 30m². Schedule the radiator to switch on/off using the 24-hour timer, ensuring warmth when you need it most whilst keeping your bills low. Our radiator puts safety at its core thanks to the advanced auto shut-off technology, including overheat and 45° tip-over safeguards. Previous page 24 Hour Timer Keeping your bills low and the temperature high. Use the simple timer to schedule your heating around your lifestyle and warm up for less. Intuitive Safety Features Automatic shut-off system for true peace of mind. Should the radiator get knocked over 45° or overheat, it will automatically power itself off. Temperature Control Dial Personalised heating controlled by you, for you. Adjust the thermostat dial and power output switch to find your perfect level of warmth. Swift Heat Activation Equipped with an advanced thermal sensor. Once reached, the radiator automatically cycles on and off to maintain your desired level of warmth. User-Focused Design Crafted with your ease of use in mind. With a cable tidy, handle, and four 360° wheels, this portable radiator is made to suit your needs. Next page 1 24 Hour Timer 2 Intuitive Safety Features 3 Temperature Control Dial 4 Swift Heat Activation 5 User-Focused Design Dimensions: H63 x W24 x D49 Weight: 10kg Fins: 11 Colour: Black Heat Settings: 1000W/1500W/2500W Room Coverage: 30m² Material: Steel Cable Length: 1.5m Cable Storage: Yes Tip-Over Protection: Yes Overheat Protection: Yes Adjustable Thermostat: Yes How does an oil-filled radiator work? Oil-filled radiators use electricity to heat a sealed reservoir of thermal oil. The oil circulates through the fins, distributing heat evenly without burning fuel. The oil never needs replacing or refilling. Is it expensive to run? Oil-filled radiators are among the most energy-efficient electric heaters. Once the oil is hot, the thermostat cycles on and off to maintain temperature, saving electricity. Running costs depend on the wattage and your electricity rate. Is it safe for children and pets? Yes. Oil-filled radiators don’t have exposed heating elements or fans. The surface can get warm, but not dangerously hot like some other heaters. Still, supervision is advised. Can I use it in a bedroom or office? Absolutely. They operate silently (no fan noise) and maintain steady heat — ideal for bedrooms, home offices, or living rooms. Is the oil-filled radiator portable? Yes, this radiator includes caster wheels — Making it easy to move between rooms.
